description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image with the yandex/clickhouse-server service. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq zip unzip curl git software-properties-common, adds the ondrej/php PPA, adds the Yandex ClickHouse repository, updates apt again, installs php7.1 php7.1-xml php7.1-zip php7.1-curl and composer, prints the PHP version, runs composer install -o --ignore-platform-reqs, and executes bin/console clickhouse:database:create and bin/console clickhouse:schema:update. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that runs vendor/bin/phpunit. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
